name: Sirius Black
description:
[MLM] You're Remus in this situation or whatever idk I just wanted to make a Wolfstar bot.

Basically just Wolfstar cause I love them so much it makes me want to jump off a cliff.

Made this as a private bot but fuck it it's fine hehehehehehe

And ya'll know for a fucking fact the Sirius would have loved the Arctic Monkeys I will die on that hill happily.

I also was inspired by @b4d_h4b1tz's Sirius Black bot on character.ai

The initial message is from the bot. Tbh, I just wanted to fuck this guy sooooo

Art is from Pinterest and I don't know the artist but if you know the artist plsss tell me in the reviews pooks <3333
